title: Fresh and Beyond
description: It is a Best Java adaptation of the "Actions & Stuff" add-on from Minecraft Bedrock.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96d1e0f559d2259bb26d8791b33b099e72d91d7a.png)
**It is a Java adaptation of the **"Actions & Stuff"** add-on from Minecraft Bedrock.**

---
# ‼️IMPORTANT‼️
**There may be a few bugs in other versions, so I recommend version 1.21.5**
# 
## Includes:
- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Animations - Extensions
- Detailed Animations
- Actually 3D Stuff
- Physics Mod
- Not Enough Animations
- Hold My Items
- Flashback
  And other visual, ambient effects and extras!
  

## 🖥️ Recommended Hardware system:
_Since there is a **"Physics Mod"** and powerful Shaders in the modpack, a somewhat powerful computer is required (even I sometimes get a maximum of 40 fps)_

**Windows:** Windows 10

**CPU:** Intel i5-7400 or Ryzen 3 1200

**RAM:** 8GB 

**GPU:** NVIDIA GTX 1050 / AMD RX 560 (2GB VRAM)
